mapper.select: select c.name as name, count(s.id) as count from student as s left join clazz as c on s.clazz_id = c.id group by s.clazz_id
select (case degree when 1 then '初中' when 2 then '高中' when 3 then '大专' when 4 then '本科' when 5 then '硕士' when 6 then '博士' else '其他' end ) as name, count(*) as value from student group by degree
mapper.delete:
delete from student where id in
#{id}
mapper.insert: insert into student(name, no, gender, phone, id_card, is_college, address, degree, graduation_date, clazz_id, violation_count, violation_score, create_time, update_time) values(#{name}, #{no}, #{gender}, #{phone}, #{idCard}, #{isCollege}, #{address}, #{degree}, #{graduationDate}, #{clazzId}, #{violationCount}, #{violationScore}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update:
update student
name = #{name},
no = #{no},
gender = #{gender},
phone = #{phone},
id_card = #{idCard},
is_college = #{isCollege},
address = #{address},
degree = #{degree},
graduation_date = #{graduationDate},
clazz_id = #{clazzId},
violation_count = #{violationCount},
violation_score = #{violationScore},
update_time = #{updateTime}
where id = #{id}
